name: Separated Parent — Moving Expenses, Childcare, and Spousal Support
description: Complete Megan Chen's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Her tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\. Save the completed return as 'megan_chen.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4055, T1-M Form, T778 Form, CRA Family Law Support Rules
metadata.occupation: Public Servant (Moved from Calgary to Ottawa)
metadata.key_complexity: T1-M Moving Expenses; T778 Childcare with two age tiers; taxable spousal support vs non-taxable child support; Schedule 5 Eligible Dependant for separated parent; two T4s from different provinces.
